title: solidago canadensis var. scabra
intro: Solidago canadensis var. scabra, also known as roughleaf goldenrod, is a variety of the common goldenrod plant, which is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of roughleaf goldenrod include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and even showing potential in alleviating symptoms of allergies and sinus issues. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects, and is also used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
